pairs.expected_answer: To home the rotary table, select the C axis on the alphanumeric keyboard, press the ZERO key, and then press START to execute the movement.

questions.es: Teniendo en cuenta que el plato divisor de la A218 se controla como eje C, ¿qué secuencia de teclas se debe pulsar en el teclado del CNC 8070 para realizar una búsqueda de referencia manual exclusiva para este eje?
questions.en: Considering that the A218 rotary table is controlled as the C axis, what key sequence must be pressed on the 8070 CNC keyboard to perform a manual home search exclusively for this axis?

pairs.expected_answer: The operator must press the STOP key on the operator panel to interrupt the program, access tool inspection from the CNC's vertical softkey menu, enable the Set-up selector on the panel, and press the 'Apertura puertas' button to open the doors.

questions.es: Si un operario está ejecutando un ciclo automático en la brochadora A218 y necesita detener la máquina para inspeccionar visualmente la brocha con las puertas abiertas, ¿qué secuencia de acciones debe realizar combinando el panel de operador y el menú del CNC?
questions.en: If an operator is running an automatic cycle on the A218 broaching machine and needs to stop the machine to visually inspect the broach with the doors open, what sequence of actions must be performed combining the operator panel and the CNC menu?

pairs.expected_answer: Theoretical travel simulation must be selected in the EDISIMU mode, as it simulates the programmed tool path without moving the axes or sending M-H-S-T controls to the PLC.

questions.es: Para verificar la sintaxis y trayectoria de un programa de brochado en la A218 sin que se muevan físicamente el carro porta-piezas ni se activen las funciones M en el PLC, ¿qué tipo de simulación se debe utilizar en el CNC 8070?
questions.en: To verify the syntax and path of a broaching program on the A218 without physically moving the carriage or activating the M functions in the PLC, what type of simulation must be used in the 8070 CNC?

pairs.expected_answer: Turn the jog selector switch to one of the incremental jog positions, select the Z axis, and press the positive or negative direction key on the JOG panel.

questions.es: ¿Cómo se puede mover el carro porta-piezas de la A218 (eje Z) una distancia incremental exacta utilizando los mandos manuales del CNC?
questions.en: How can the A218 carriage (Z axis) be moved an exact incremental distance using the CNC manual controls?

pairs.expected_answer: No, it is not necessary. In the automatic block search, the CNC runs the search up to the block where the program was interrupted, even if the machine was stopped due to an emergency.

questions.es: Si se pulsa una seta de emergencia en la A218 interrumpiendo un ciclo de mecanizado, al restaurar el sistema y utilizar la búsqueda de bloque automática en el CNC, ¿es necesario introducir manualmente el número de bloque de parada?
questions.en: If an emergency button is pressed on the A218 interrupting a machining cycle, when restoring the system and using the automatic block search on the CNC, is it necessary to manually enter the stop block number?

pairs.expected_answer: The instruction #CAX must be programmed to activate the spindle as a C axis.

questions.es: ¿Qué instrucción de alto nivel del CNC 8070 se debe programar para activar el husillo del plato divisor de la A218 para que funcione como eje C?
questions.en: What high-level instruction of the 8070 CNC must be programmed to activate the spindle of the A218 rotary table to work as a C axis?

pairs.expected_answer: The operator must go to the Utilities mode, access the folder C:\FAGORCNC\Users\PRG, select the program, and change the 'modifiable' attribute (indicated by the letter -M-).

questions.es: Considerando que los parámetros de brochado de la A218 se guardan como programas en C:\FAGORCNC\Users\PRG, ¿cómo se puede evitar que un operador modifique estos ciclos desde el modo EDISIMU?
questions.en: Considering that the A218 broaching parameters are saved as programs in C:\FAGORCNC\Users\PRG, how can an operator be prevented from modifying these cycles from the EDISIMU mode?

pairs.expected_answer: The CNC maintains the history of the active G and M functions, feedrate, and spindle speed from the point where the automatic cycle was interrupted.

questions.es: Durante el modo Set-up en la A218, si se interrumpe el ciclo y se ejecuta un movimiento del eje Z en modo MDI/MDA, ¿qué ocurre con las funciones M y G que estaban activas en el programa principal?
questions.en: During Set-up mode on the A218, if the cycle is interrupted and a Z-axis movement is executed in MDI/MDA mode, what happens to the M and G functions that were active in the main program?

pairs.expected_answer: The common parameters table should be used, as it is shared across all channels.

questions.es: Si se desea definir un parámetro aritmético en el CNC 8070 que sea accesible y compartido por todos los canales de ejecución de la A218, ¿qué tabla de parámetros se debe utilizar?
questions.en: If you want to define an arithmetic parameter in the 8070 CNC that is accessible and shared by all execution channels of the A218, which parameter table should be used?

pairs.expected_answer: The preparatory functions G54, G55, G56, G57, G58, and G59 are used to activate absolute zero offsets 1 through 6.

questions.es: Si se mecanizan múltiples piezas en diferentes posiciones del plato divisor de la A218, ¿qué códigos G del CNC 8070 permiten activar los decalajes de cero absolutos del 1 al 6?
questions.en: If multiple parts are machined at different positions on the A218 rotary table, which G codes of the 8070 CNC allow activating absolute zero offsets 1 through 6?

pairs.expected_answer: Press the key combination [CTRL] + [F12] to open the Utilities mode, and use the 'Delete' softkey to erase the program.

questions.es: Usando los atajos de teclado del panel FAGOR, ¿qué combinación abre directamente el modo Utilidades para poder borrar un programa de brochado de la A218?
questions.en: Using the keyboard shortcuts on the FAGOR panel, which combination directly opens the Utilities mode to be able to delete an A218 broaching program?
